roa.docketEntryComment: Order of the Court Finding Good Cause  to Continue due to  Public Health RE COVID-19 Pandemic
Consolidated Complaint
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Complaint
Sufficient Probable Cause Filed
Bench Warrant Issued
SAW WARRANT FROM 03/24/22; SAW RECALLED 051922
SAW ISSUED 051822
DEF MOT TO MODIFY RELEASE EM FILED
SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISSUED 3-24-22
DEF MOT TO MODIFY RELEASE EM, FILED
SAW RECEIVED 01/11/22
DA MOTION TO AMEND AND CONSOLIDATE FILED
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:TRIAL/LD:04-28-22 (GC COVID)/X:PEOPLE APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5000/X:1 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/VD:TRIAL, LAST DAY AND HEARING ON 06-20-22/

/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO RELEASE ON OR/DAWT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT BY END OF BUSINESS ON MONDAY 05-09-22,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:ABIDE BY STAY AWAY FROM 1400 SUNNYDALE OF 150 YARDS/CONT/

/FTRRECORD/CAL:JURY TRIAL & NFILING OF AMENDED COMPLAINT & POSSIBLE ACM &SAW/NP/X:THE PEOPLE FILE AN AMENDED, CONSOLIDATED DOMESTIC VIOLENCE COMPLAINT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSERESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN DEPT 50/DOP/

/CAL:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/INTC/CTORD:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTEDWITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROMCUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TRAIL/DOPU:ACM/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:JURY TRIAL & FILING OF AMENDED COMPLAINT/X:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE GRANTED ON 11-17-21/X:THE PEOPLE DO NOT HAVE AN AMENDED COMPLAINTTO FILE TODAY, BUT WILL HAVEAT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE/X:BOTH PARTIES ARE READY/X:THERE ARE NO TRIAL DEPARTMENTS AVAILABLE AT THIS TIME/X:GOOD CAUSE FOUND ON 10-08-21 TO CONTINUE BEYOND THE LAST DAY OF  10-08-21 CONTINUES/LDTR: 10-08-21 (GC COVID19)/CONT/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM, NTW, STWMCUS OR STWMOCUS (DELETE NON-APPLICABLE ABBREVIATION)/LDTR: 11-24-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:YESSICA CAROLINA GALEAS DURON/SA2:1400 SUNNYDALE AVE,,SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 11-04-21/CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 11-17-21/SB:2HRS/
/CAL:TRIAL/FTRRECORDED/DAWT/NTW/LDTR:04-28-22(GC COVID19)/X:NTW WAS ON THERECORD 03-29-22/CAUSE1/CONT/DOPU:ACM/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:TRIAL/DAWT/LD:04-28-22/CONT/DOPU:ACM/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS & PENDING SAW/INTC/DENIED/SAWD/LD:04-28-22 (30TH)/CONTD:TRIAL/DOPU:ACM/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/FAVRPT/CONT/DOPU:AC
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/INTC/FAVRPT/CONTD:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/DOPU:ACM/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/INTC /CTORD:SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT OF 01/12/22DISCHARGED/FAVRPT/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:ACM/
/CAL:TRIAL & MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/FTRRECORDED/DAWT/MO GRTD/LD:10-08-21 (GC COVID19)/CONTD:TRIAL AND FILING OF CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/SB:2 HOUR/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/INTC/FAVRPT/X:PARTIES CONFIRM TRIAL DATE/CONTD:TRIAL ON 11-17-21/SB:2 HRS/
